wrap this operation from LAPACK but don't expose it, and I think we should for two reasons:

1. MATLAB has this operation
2. 3 of the SuiteSparse solvers expose rcond as their method for condition checking.

I think it's better for LinearAlgebra to own this operation, than SuiteSparse given it's also defined in LAPACK. 

The biggest issue is that other packages already have an `rcond`: MatrixPencils.jl (which just wraps LAPACK like here), and RandomizedLinAlg.jl where it means "estimate the condition number randomly". So I don't think we should export it.

No tests yet, I will add soon.
